features: 1. Package Included: 1pc 1970s Disco Wig + 1pc Sunglasses + 1pc Moustache + 1pc Hip-hop Chain + 1 Tooth Fang Spear Leather Necklace + 1pc Wig Cap
2. Rocking Dude Wig: Rock on roll never dies, Metal for ever! Once you put on the Disco Dirt Bag Wig, Sunglasses, Necklace and Moustache, you will get back to the 1970s in no time.

3. Get Back to the 70s Disco Party: Enjoy a professional-looking hair wig that celebrates all things Glam Rock and puts the pedal to the medal when it comes to DIY Costumes! With 100% premium heat-resistant synthetic fiber construction, you can style the retro disco wig with hairspray to create that authentic, 70s Rocker look, and party like a rockstar!

4. One Size Fits All: Equipped with a breathable rose net cap which is specially designed for adult, the average cap size circumference is 22.5 inches with 2 adjustable straps, which can be intertwined to a fixed position to be suitable for different head sizes.

5. Multipurpose: This afro wig is a perfect choice for all kinds of parties. You can wear it on Halloween, 60s 70s Disco Themed Parties, Rocker Costume, Comic-con, Cosplay events, Carnival, or just for fun.
